worth_reading.title: Give your eve agent GitHub tools
worth_reading.author: Vercel AI
worth_reading.summary: GitHub Tools now ships an eve toolset through the new @github-tools/sdk/eve subpath. One file in agent/tools/ can register every GitHub tool, or use a preset such as maintainer , so you can build a complete GitHub agent in nine lines of code. Safe by default: Every write tool, such as mergePullRequest , requires approval unless you opt out. Gate individual tools with always , once , or an input-dependent predicate; pauses survive restarts and deploys. Presets: code-review , i
worth_reading.excerpt: GitHub Tools now ships an eve toolset through the new @github-tools/sdk/eve subpath. One file in agent/tools/ can register every GitHub tool, or use a preset such as maintainer , so you can build a complete GitHub agent in nine lines of code. Safe by default: Every write tool, such as mergePullRequest , requires approval unless you opt out.
